Sprint Planner

Acquire-to-Pay Agile Release Train — team capacity submission

SELECTION WINDOW
01Select team & sprint
02Enter roster availability
03Review & submit

Team & Sprint

PI
—
Sprint Start
—
Sprint End
—
Submitted Date
—

Sprint shows the window currently open today. Dates and PI fill automatically.

Team Roster & Availability Full edit — Admin

You're signed in as a Normal user. You can add team members and edit details. Admins can manage exports and view all team submissions.
NameMain Role Leave (Days) % Sprint Overhead / BAUAvailable Days Notes
Public HolidayAnnual LeaveOther

Submission History

Showing the latest 10 submissions. Select both Team and Sprint to narrow the list.

Loading submissions...

Automated Capacity KPIs

Team Size
0
Excludes Architect, Scrum Master, PO
Total Days
0
Sum of Available Days
Sprint Overhead
0.0
BAU/meetings/training from available days
Sprint Capacity
0.0
Total Days − Overhead
Dev / Test Bifurcation
—
Dev 0% Test 0%

Team size excludes Architect/Scrum Master/PO. Overhead is unproductive BAU/meetings/training time applied on available days. Bifurcation splits Dev vs Test days.

Submission Details & Notes

Sprint goal can be edited until the sprint start date.

Goals achieved can be edited only after the sprint end date.

Objectives can be edited only before the sprint start date.

Submitted by: —  |  Date: —
